description: Embedding call guard cases (F-SEC-10), shared by all three SDKs. For each case: build a gateway with PiiGuard (default config) and a capturing mock provider, run `texts` through the SDK's embed() entry point, then assert (1) the detected PII entity types match `expected.piiEntityTypes`, (2) the text that reached the provider contains every string in `expected.redactedContains` and none in `expected.redactedNotContains`, and (3) the response carries one embedding vector per input text.
